text.title: Daily Ads Anomaly Checklist Procedure
text.summary: 15-minute daily procedure running 6 anomaly checks against thresholds + producing a structured log.

step.name: pull-yesterday-metrics
step.input: Ad-platform API or dashboard; reporting window = previous calendar day
step.action: Pull per-ad-set: spend, CPA, frequency, CTR, conversions, account-health status. Snapshot the 7-day rolling average.

step.name: apply-thresholds
step.input: metrics + pre-declared thresholds (spend 1.5×7d avg, CPA 1.5×7d avg, frequency >4.0, CTR -30%, conversions -40%, account_health no_warnings)
step.action: For each check, compute actual vs threshold; mark tripped boolean.
step.output: checks array (6 entries) with tripped flags

step.name: check-prior-day-persistence
step.action: For each tripped check, look up same ad-set in yesterday's log. If same check tripped, escalate.
step.output: checks array enriched with persistence flag

step.name: decide-action
step.action: Map each tripped check to one of {pause, reduce-budget, raise-budget, escalate, no-op}. Pauses default to auto-resume after 24h.
step.decision-gate: If action=escalate, require escalation_thread; pause action requires auto_resume_at.

step.name: apply-actions
step.action: Execute reversible actions (budget changes, pause). Open escalation thread for escalations. Do NOT disable accounts.

step.name: write-and-validate-log
step.action: Serialize to JSON per output contract. Run validator. Publish to log store.
step.decision-gate: If validator non-zero, fix + re-run; never publish partial.
